MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.'s MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES.

BH Financial Services, Inc.'s motion for entry of judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed judgment.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-15-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
